narrative:
Newton Falls Village 2A (precinct in Trumbull County) has 557 registered voters, with 62.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.7%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.2 percentage points.
